title: Cal's Extra Gems
description: Some extra crystals and gems for your world!  adds 2 new armor and tool sets and over 90 new blocks in total!
body:
Add some extra crytals and gems to your world! Cal's Extra Gems adds 2 new armor and tool sets, sapphire, opal, 6 colors of tourmaline, 4 colors of topaz, 3 new quartz colors, 5 beryl colors, and emerald slabs and walls. There's over 90 new blocks in total!

**Where to find the ores:**

**Sapphire** can be found in any Biome between -64 and 80

**Topaz** can be found in any biome between 50 and -32

**Opal** can be found in any biome between 30 and -80, being most common around 55

**All beryl** (including aquamarine!) can be found in any biome between 320 and -16, being more common around 168

**All Quartz** can be found anywhere the nether

**Black Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Savanas , being most common at 0

**Green Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Forests, being most common at 0

**Blue Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Jungles, being most common at 0

**Pink Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Taigas, being most common at 0

**Orange Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Hills, being most common at 0

**Watermelon Tourmaline** can be found between 50 and -50 in Jungles, being most common at 0

I plan to add more gems in the future!
